⦗OSS CAD Suite⦘ (venv-church) sipantichijk@penguin:~/church-machine/hardware/soc_combined$ cd ~/church-machine/hardware/soc_combined

# 1. Show the actual system_ramA EFX_RAM10 instance names (all 64)
grep "EFX_RAM10" outflow/church_soc_cm.map.v \
  | grep -v "u_cm" | grep "ram_sym\|system_ram" \
  | grep -o '\\[^ (]*' | head -20

# 2. Show one instance's full defparam block (INIT_ names and format)
LINENUM=$(grep -n "EFX_RAM10" outflow/church_soc_cm.map.v \
  | grep -v "u_cm" | grep "ram_sym\|system_ram" | head -1 | cut -d: -f1)
sed -n "${LINENUM},$((LINENUM+50))p" outflow/church_soc_cm.map.v | grep "INIT_"
\u_sapphire/u_EfxSapphireSoc/system_ramA_logic/ram_symbol3__D$g1
\u_sapphire/u_EfxSapphireSoc/system_ramA_logic_io_bus_rsp_payload_fragment_data
\u_sapphire/u_EfxSapphireSoc/system_ramA_logic/ram_symbol0__D$d12
\u_sapphire/u_EfxSapphireSoc/system_ramA_logic_io_bus_rsp_payload_fragment_data
\u_sapphire/u_EfxSapphireSoc/system_ramA_logic/ram_symbol0__D$c12
\u_sapphire/u_EfxSapphireSoc/system_ramA_logic_io_bus_rsp_payload_fragment_data
\u_sapphire/u_EfxSapphireSoc/system_ramA_logic/ram_symbol3__D$12
\u_sapphire/u_EfxSapphireSoc/system_ramA_logic_io_bus_rsp_payload_fragment_data
\u_sapphire/u_EfxSapphireSoc/system_ramA_logic/ram_symbol0__D$g1
\u_sapphire/u_EfxSapphireSoc/system_ramA_logic_io_bus_rsp_payload_fragment_data
\u_sapphire/u_EfxSapphireSoc/system_ramA_logic/ram_symbol2__D$2
\u_sapphire/u_EfxSapphireSoc/system_ramA_logic_io_bus_rsp_payload_fragment_data
\u_sapphire/u_EfxSapphireSoc/system_ramA_logic/ram_symbol3__D$2
\u_sapphire/u_EfxSapphireSoc/system_ramA_logic_io_bus_rsp_payload_fragment_data
\u_sapphire/u_EfxSapphireSoc/system_ramA_logic/ram_symbol2__D$g1
\u_sapphire/u_EfxSapphireSoc/system_ramA_logic_io_bus_rsp_payload_fragment_data
\u_sapphire/u_EfxSapphireSoc/system_ramA_logic/ram_symbol1__D$g1
\u_sapphire/u_EfxSapphireSoc/system_ramA_logic_io_bus_rsp_payload_fragment_data
\u_sapphire/u_EfxSapphireSoc/system_ramA_logic/ram_symbol1__D$2
\u_sapphire/u_EfxSapphireSoc/system_ramA_logic_io_bus_rsp_payload_fragment_data
grep: write error: Broken pipe
grep: write error: Broken pipe
grep: write error: Broken pipe
grep: write error: Broken pipe
            .RDATA({\u_sapphire/u_EfxSapphireSoc/system_ramA_logic_io_bus_rsp_payload_fragment_data [31]})) /* verific EFX_ATTRIBUTE_CELL_NAME=EFX_RAM10, READ_WIDTH=1, WRITE_WIDTH=1,     defparam \u_sapphire/u_EfxSapphireSoc/system_ramA_logic/ram_symbol3__D$g1 .INIT_1 = 256'h0001A0334063680CC84E43624099032092011201120210090109009004800120;
